stemHtml: A complete voice position report contains, in order...

options.a: ID, position, time, FL/altitude, next position and ETA, ensuing position.
options.b: ID, position, time, TAS, FL/altitude, next position.
options.c: ID, position, FL/altitude, time, next position.
options.d: ID, position, time, FL/altitude, next position and ETA, ensuing significant point.
